   .. data:: verbosity
      :type: int
      :value: 0 or 1
      
      Set to ``1`` if you wish to see any errors that occured during computation and ``0`` otherwise.
      
      .. data:: kp
      :type: double
      :value: 0.05
      
      Parameter to set the pivot scale in :math:`Mpc^{-1}`. Planck mission sets it at :math:`0.05 Mpc^{-1}`.
